description: Elevator Inspector — inspects elevators, escalators, and conveyances for ASME A17.1 compliance, annual certifications, and safety device testing

hard_stops.label: Safety Device Test Failed
hard_stops.logic: Governor, safeties, or buffers failed the required Category 1 or Category 5 test — elevator must be taken out of service

hard_stops.label: Emergency Communication Inoperative
hard_stops.logic: Elevator emergency phone or two-way communication device is not operational — ADA and ASME A17.1 2.27.1.1 violation

hard_stops.label: Annual Certification Expired
hard_stops.logic: Elevator annual operating certificate has expired — conveyance cannot be operated until re-inspected and certified

soft_flags.label: Five-Year Full Load Test Due
soft_flags.logic: Elevator is due for the 5-year full load safety test per ASME A17.1 — schedule with elevator contractor
